title: delphinium parryi var. subglobosum
intro: Delphinium parryi var. subglobosum, also known as the Pinnate Larkspur, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic and antitussive effects, making it a potential treatment for coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Delphinium parryi var. subglobosum include its ability to relieve bronchitis and asthma symptoms, and its potential to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its roots and flowers, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
